title: TransactionReceipt
description: Receipt object from tx.wait() or trackTransaction result. Follows standard EVM receipt structure.

blockNumber.description: Block number in which the transaction was included

blockHash.description: Hash of the block containing this transaction - inferred from EVM standard

status.description: Transaction status: 1 for success, 0 for failure

gasUsed.description: Amount of gas used by this transaction as BigInt string

effectiveGasPrice.description: Effective gas price paid as BigInt string - inferred from EVM standard

from.description: Address of the transaction sender (UEA on Push Chain)

to.description: Address of the transaction recipient. Null for contract creation.

contractAddress.description: Address of created contract if this was a contract creation transaction

logs.description: Array of log entries emitted during transaction execution

address.description: Address of the contract that emitted the log

logIndex.description: Index of this log within the block

transactionIndex.description: Index of the transaction within the block

blockHash.description: Hash of the block containing this log

transactionHash.description: Hash of the transaction that emitted this log

transactionIndex.description: Index of the transaction within its block - inferred from EVM standard

cumulativeGasUsed.description: Total gas used in the block up to and including this transaction - inferred from EVM standard

notes: Receipt structure is inferred from standard EVM transaction receipts. Push Chain is 100% EVM-compatible so standard receipt fields are expected.
